nasb.text: Now therefore, O Lord God, the word that You have spoken concerning Your servant and his house, confirm it forever, and do as You have spoken,

esv.text: And now, O Lord God, confirm forever the word that you have spoken concerning your servant and concerning his house, and do as you have spoken.

cnv.text: 耶和華　神啊！你所應許關於你僕人和他的家的話，現在求你永遠堅守，並且照著你所說的去行吧；

ccb.text: “耶和华上帝啊，求你永远信守你对仆人和仆人家的应许。
